subject: Honedge, a sword-creature Pokemon with a blue eye on its handguard and a trailing blue cloth
description: A single-edged sword leans against the base of a large mossy tree root in a forest clearing. The sword's handguard bears a prominent blue eye — the true body of this creature — and a long blue cloth or ribbon drapes and coils loosely around it, pooling near the base. A small pink flower blooms in the grass nearby, and a striped blue cloth bundle rests on the ground. The surroundings are lush green grass, moss-covered stone, and dappled forest light, giving the scene a peaceful but uncanny quality.
foreground: sword with blue eye handguard and trailing blue cloth resting against mossy tree root
background: forest floor with moss, grass, stone ruins
emotion: still and watchful; the single eye gives the scene an uncanny observing quality
